claim_boundary: CAD-derived camera optical package validation and result template; not supplier module approval, image-quality calibration, or Camera HAL evidence.

camera_components.front_camera: 5-8 MP fixed-focus MIPI module behind cover glass
camera_components.rear_camera_glass: chemically strengthened rear camera cover window

cases.target: >=0.8 mm radial margin around rear AF lens
rear AF stack depth <=5.5 mm and >=2.0 mm battery gap
>=1.0 mm radial module margin and <=0.8 mm cover glass for front under-glass camera
>=1.0 mm front camera to earpiece receiver gap
front camera under glass, rear AF camera through dedicated cover window

measurements.notes: Rear lens optical center to rear cover-window datum.
Front camera optical center to under-glass aperture datum.
AF rear module focus and cover-window optical quality check.
Front fixed-focus module through cover-glass image sharpness.
Color shift from cover-glass/black mask stack over front camera.
Dust, vignette, or gasket intrusion defects in rear cover window.
Both front and rear cameras enumerate and stream with selected module pinout.

release_blockers: Need supplier drawings/STEP for rear and front module optical center, FPC exit, and lens stack.
Need rear cover-window dust gasket drawing and first-article center/MTF measurements.
Need front under-glass capture validation through selected cover glass and black mask.
Need V4L2 or Android Camera HAL streaming logs with selected sensor drivers and pinout.
